extraction_notes: The Wikipedia source provides only high-level information about The Terminator (1992) Sega Genesis game, identifying it as a shoot 'em up developed by Probe Software and published by Virgin Games. No specific audio parameters, musical composition details, tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics are documented in the available source material. The source mentions that the Sega CD version (1993) had enhanced music that took advantage of the console's capabilities, but provides no technical details about the Genesis version's audio.
